title: Carina Constellation (v0.5)
description: A network of connected Vela Atlases across scientific domains. The sixteenth Carina primitive (v0.5). Composes one or more Atlases (vat_*) into a higher-level domain map; cross-Atlas bridges live as the Atlas's own bridges where the bridge endpoints land in different composing Atlases. The roadmap doc names Constellation as the layer above Atlas. Constellation is read-only over per-Atlas snapshots; Atlas stays the unit of reviewer-confirmed bridges.

scope_note.description: Optional bounded-question text describing what cross-domain question this Constellation maps.

items.description: Pointer to a Bridge primitive whose endpoints span two composing Atlases.
